messages.content: Hi there! How can I help you?
Can you briefly describe your super resolution technology?

Yes, our super resolution technology uses a deep learning architecture to achieve resolutions up to 50 times greater than traditional methods. It works by extracting the maximum amount of detail from an image and sharpening it, resulting in a clearer and more defined image.

evidence: Can you briefly describe your super resolution technology?
